'''Sena Leikvold Midanyl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Biography==
During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Midanyl became chief aide of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] of Corellia, and continued in this role after he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. After Bel Iblis' split from [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], she helped Bel Iblis and [[Irenez (Human)|Irenez]] plan their attacks against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. Although Midanyl harbored no love for Mothma, she eventually realized the [[Chandrilan/Legends|Chandrilan]] woman did not desire to be a new [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and was the one who suggested that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] request Bel Iblis to rejoin his old counterpart, knowing that he would never go back on his own.

At some point in her life, she bore two sons, [[Peter Midanyl|Peter]] and [[Dayvid Midanyl|Dayvid]]. As of 9 ABY, they served aboard the Bel Iblis-aligned Dreadnought ''[[Harrier]]''.
